---
id: list-o-auth-2-consent-sessions
title: "List OAuth 2.0 Consent Sessions of a Subject"
description: "This endpoint lists all subject's granted consent sessions, including client and granted scope."
sidebar_label: "List OAuth 2.0 Consent Sessions of a Subject"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List OAuth 2.0 Consent Sessions of a Subject"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/admin/oauth2/auth/sessions/consent"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint lists all subject's granted consent sessions, including client and granted scope.
If the subject is unknown or has not granted any consent sessions yet, the endpoint returns an
empty JSON array with status code 200 OK.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
